### Hourly Schedule

Starts the workflow on a timer — every 1 h. No input data; downstream nodes fetch what they need.

Next: Classify with AI

### Classify with AI

LLM classification into: Mention, Question, Complaint (+fallback). Output port order matches this list.

Ports: ①→ Store as Mention · ②→ Store as Question · ③→ Store as Complaint · ④→ Alert Discord — Other

### Groq Chat Model

Chat model powering the AI step (model: `llama-3.3-70b-versatile`). Swap providers here without rewiring.

Feeds **Classify with AI** as `languageModel`

🔑 Groq API key

### Store as Mention

googleSheets — `append` operation against the connected account.

Next: Reunite Branches

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2 / service account

googleSheets — `append` operation against the connected account.

### Alert Discord — Other

discord — `action` operation against the connected account.

Next: Reunite Branches

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Discord webhook URL

### Reunite Branches

Rejoins 4 branches into one stream (mode: append) so downstream logic runs once.

Next: Send Summary to Discord

### Send Summary to Discord

discord — `action` operation against the connected account.

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Discord webhook URL

# Track mentions of brand mentions with HTTP / REST API and Discord hands-free

**Pattern:** Social Listening · **Level:** Foundation · **Trigger:** Scheduled

## What it does
Track mentions of brand mentions with HTTP / REST API and Discord hands-free. It runs automatically on a schedule.

## Why it exists
Manual scheduling is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Hourly Schedule → Classify with AI → Store as Mention → Reunite Branches → Send Summary to Discord

## Use it for
- Teams that want to social listening without manual effort
- Anyone automating scheduling in marketing
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Responds in seconds
- Runs 24/7 in the background
- Saves hours of manual work each week

## Before first run
Connect credentials: Discord webhook URL; Google OAuth2 / service account; Groq API key.
Follow the color key: 🟦 entry · 🟪 AI · 🟫 actions · ⬜ utilities · 🟩 outputs · 🟥 error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath — read those before editing.

## 🤖 AI cluster

Purple nodes form one AI unit: the root node orchestrates, sub-nodes plug in via typed ports (model / memory / tools / parser). Swap the chat model without rewiring anything else. Costs scale with tokens — keep prompts lean and cap iterations.

## 🛠 Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see 🔑 lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your scheduling process. Every node card explains its role — safe to extend at any marked branch.
